    Module: cor_surrogates

    module-cor-surrogates.Rmd

    Purpose

    cor_surrogates identifies optimal immune correlates of vaccine protection using cross-validated Super Learner (CV-SL) variable importance (VIMP) analysis. It runs multiple varset jobs (parallelisable via SLURM array), computes VIMP scores, and assembles summary tables and figures.

    Source module: correlates_reporting2/cor_surrogates/
    Key report: cor_surrogates/report.Rmd (also trial-specific sub-reports e.g. report_sub_Moderna.Rmd)

    Example data 

    report_root  <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
moderna_path <- file.path(
  report_root, "data_clean",
  "moderna_mock_data_processed_with_riskscore.csv"
)

    Reproduce the report

    1. Configure the session 

    library(utilrep2)

report_root <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"),
  report_root = report_root
)

    2. Run the module

    cor_surrogates is structured around SLURM array jobs. The varset_number argument corresponds to SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID. Run each varset sequentially from R:

    # Run varsets 1 through N sequentially (use parallel jobs on HPC)
n_varsets <- 5L  # adjust to the number defined for this trial

for (v in seq_len(n_varsets)) {
  run_cor_surrogates(
    trial         = "moderna_mock",
    endpoint      = "D57",
    varset_number = v,
    report        = FALSE   # suppress report until all varsets done
  )
}

    After all varsets complete, render the report:

    run_cor_surrogates(
  trial         = "moderna_mock",
  endpoint      = "D57",
  varset_number = 1L,
  report        = TRUE
)

    Full sequence of scripts executed per varset

    1. run_cvsl_varsets.R — fits CV-SL for one varset
    2. get_vimp.R — computes VIMP from SL objects
    3. createRDAfiles_fromSLobjects.R — serialises results to .rda
    4. tables_figures.R — generates summary tables and VIMP plots

    Output

    Results are saved under cor_surrogates/output/<trial>/. The final report PDF is cor_surrogates/report.pdf.

    Report sections

    • VIMP bar charts per marker
    • Cross-validated AUC summaries
    • Trial-specific sub-reports (Moderna, HVTN705, Janssen, VAT08, COVAIL)

    Supported trials

    Trial Endpoint
    moderna_mock, moderna_real D57
    hvtn705second D210
    janssen_la_partA D29
    vat08_combined D43
    covail (xassays) D15 windows

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
